data.title: Anglo American Signs $5 Billion Partnership With Codelco, DeBeers Weighs On Financial Results
data.description: Anglo American and Codelco sign $5B deal to jointly develop copper mines in Chile, boosting Anglo's production and share price. De Beers separation ongoing.

data.title: Dogecoin's Journey From Memecoin To 'Real' Money 'Crazy But Cool,' Says Elon Musk: 'I Am Living The Meme'
data.description: Tesla Inc. and SpaceX CEO, Elon Musk embraced his meme status during his recent appearance at CPAC 2025, tying it to his association with the popular cryptocurrency, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE).

data.title: Loar Holdings Expands With LMB Acquisition, Raises FY25 EPS Outlook
data.description: Loar Holdings to acquire LMB Fans & Motors for €365 million + net debt. Q4 2024 net sales and earnings exceed expectations.

data.title: Institutional Investors Load Up On Technology And Financial Stocks In Q4 While Reducing Positions In Healthcare Sector Amid Political Uncertainty
data.description: Institutional investors were bullish on technology and financials during the fourth quarter and sold the most from health care sector.
